item.title: Queen Mary seen for the first time since announcing the death of her father John Donaldson at age 84
item.description: ‘My heart is heavy and my thoughts are grey.’

item.description: Whether you want basic internet or ultra‑fast speeds, these are the cheapest and best NBN plans you can snag this month.

item.description: The chemicals have been linked to a range of negative health effects.

item.description: The girl had been missing since April 2024, when she was 13 years old.

item.title: Iranian footballers rebuild in Australia after asylum bid: ‘Safe haven’
item.description: ‘This challenging time has provided us with hope for a future where we can compete in safety.’

item.description: The ballots were discovered earlier this week inside three sealed boxes.

item.title: Soaring farm costs spark warnings of major price hikes for meat
item.description: ‘If things don’t turn around, many farmers could be forced to cut production.’

item.title: Young gun Kai Allen salutes in New Zealand for first Supercars win
item.description: The 20-year-old kept championship leader Brodie Kostecki at bay in a historic race in Christchurch.

item.title: Season-ending fears for gun ball-winner Gryan Miers as Geelong investigate
item.description: The club is investigating the situation after originally thinking it was a minor issue.

item.description: Witnesses were amazed when a ute crashed into a bus stop and an unlikley hero came out of nowhere.

item.title: ‘President at 21’: Meet the Australian running a self-declared state from exile after being deported from claimed land
item.description: Hundreds of people have been granted citizenship despite legal doubts.

item.title: Reigning Bathurst champ Matt Payne breaks through for ‘epic’ first win of Supercars season
item.description: It was an impressive recovery after he struck disaster in the day’s first race in Christchurch.

item.title: Radiology industry under scrutiny after missed cancer diagnosis and warning over unregistered MRI staff
item.description: An industry body says current practice ‘undermines the safety standards expected within the Australian healthcare system’.

item.description: The former SAS soldier is on bail after being charged with five counts of war crime murder.

item.title: How old is too old to breastfeed? An expert weighs in as Rumer Willis faces criticism
item.description: The actress hit back at condemnation of her choice to nurse her three-year-old daughter.

item.title: Questions on human rights records and Russian oil hang over Anthony Albanese’s fuel supply deals
item.description: The PM and other world leaders are crossing the globe to secure fuel deals. But are they crossing the line?

item.description: The motorsport world is grieving following a devastating seven-car crash at the Nurburgring.

item.title: Victorian Premier Jacinta Allan to extend free public transport for a month and then slash fares
item.description: The move will save the average commuter more than $850.

item.description: ‘In a way, they’re almost like a different species to us.’

item.description: ‘They see themselves as superior because they don’t experience fear.’

item.description: Two opinion polls show the party slipping from its recent highs.

item.title: Heartbreak as three-legged dog Pixel returned to shelter after just one night
item.description: The RSPCA is appealing to the public to make informed decisions after three-legged dog Pixel, who had been at a shelter for 145 days, was returned just one day after adoption.

item.description: The 82-year-old had pleaded not guilty to all historical charges.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Australia secures another four cargo ships worth of diesel, Anthony Albanese and Chris Bowen announce
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: Girl, 3, dies after being hit by ute while walking with family in Caboolture, Queensland
item.description: Three other people were taken to hospital for emotional distress.

item.title: Script flipped as Brad Scott pushes Nate Caddy two weeks after Alastair Clarkson exchange: ‘Tough love’
item.description: It’s ‘not something we often see’ but the second ‘strong’ incident in three weeks has revealed plenty.

item.title: YouTuber under investigation for filming fugitive Dezi Freeman’s secret hideout in Victoria
item.description: The actions have been slammed for causing further trauma to victims’ families.

item.title: E-scooter hire ditched in Hobart over safety and behavioural concerns
item.description: The hire service has been banned after more than 37 deaths nationwide already this decade.

item.title: Traffic fines issued by an AI-camera dismissed in WA
item.description: More than $1 million in fines were wiped out due to the AI-powered camera.

item.title: Moana Pasifika ‘tragedy’ inspires ex-Wallabies captain to consider NRL defection with PNG Chiefs
item.description: The 110-Test great is plotting a move ‘home’ for a cause close to his heart.

item.title: Collingwood star Beau McCreery responds to Tasmania’s reported $7m offer
item.description: ‘I was just as rattled as you when you heard it.’

item.title: Benji Marshall details ‘confidence issues’ behind decision to drop Wests Tigers teen prodigy Heamasi Makasini
item.description: The Tigers coach has called out an ‘unfair’ aspect of the 18-year-old’s ‘awesome’ start to his career.

item.title: Four teenagers facing court accused of kidnapping, tasering and torturing a boy north of Brisbane
item.description: A member of the public came to the victim’s aid after he was allegedly taken against his will and attacked.

item.title: Tongues wag as cameras spot out-of-contract Crows mid Mitch Hinge in Hawthorn’s rooms: ‘No’
item.description: ‘I smell a rat hiding in plain sight.’

item.title: Bailey Smith calls out AFL ‘clowns’ after viral request for mental health round denied
item.description: The outspoken advocate’s push was quickly knocked back despite proving popular.

item.title: Health Minister Mark Butler reveals NDIS overhaul and how federal government will rein in growth
item.description: Mark Butler will target the scheme’s out-of-control growth while admitting Australians need ‘more ID to get into a licensed club than to be an NDIS provider’.

item.title: Deadloch and Offspring actress Alicia Gardiner accused of ‘breaking the girl code’ in alleged assault
item.description: The actor has fronted a Melbourne court, charged over grabbing a security guard in a compromising spot.

item.title: Concerning update issued after Harrison Petty’s ‘unique’ mid-game health scare
item.description: Melbourne coach Steven King has opened up on the ‘unique situation’.

item.title: Lexus tackling Cadillac, Volvo rivals with luxury three-row electric SUV spied testing
item.description: Lexus is working on its largest electric SUV yet, which will offer three rows of seating and could be produced in right-hand drive.

item.title: Mystery as Volkswagen van towing vessel on trailer pulled from Currumbin Creek on Gold Coast
item.description: The vehicle and boat had spent more than two years underwater and were caked in mud and marine life.

item.title: Police officer checked for head and leg injuries after he and man who allegedly sparked foot pursuit struck by SUV in Bankstown
item.description: The senior constable and another man who allegedly fled police are in hospital receiving care.

item.title: Strong El Nino predicted with drought, bushfires possible across Australia
item.description: ‘We’re seeing our fuels start to dry out and ... get ready to carry fire through the landscape.’

item.title: First Ford Mustang GTD confirmed for Australia
item.description: At least one example of Ford’s fastest and most expensive factory Mustang will come Down Under, and it won't be locked away from prying eyes.

item.title: Ford Everest Wildtrak returns for 2026 with higher price, new colours
item.description: The limited-edition Ford Everest Wildtrak is returning for a third time with its largest production run yet for Australia, but a higher price.

item.title: GWM Haval Jolion Max: New Chinese SUV coming to Australia in late-2026 with EV and hybrid options
item.description: China's GWM is adding yet another SUV to the Haval lineup called the Jolion Max, which will offer HEV and BEV options when it arrives in late 2026.

item.title: Chris Scott fails to provide clarity on situation surrounding gun forward Tyson Stengle
item.description: The Geelong coach said a potential return to the field is in the hands of the AFL.

item.title: St George debutant Kade Reed debunks Shane Flanagan’s theory on him after sacking
item.description: The youngster has publicly dismissed the concern that hung over his head under the old leadership.

item.title: Denise Richards and daughter Lola Sheen lead fresh tributes to Patrick Muldoon after ‘sudden’ death
item.description: Patrick Muldoon’s family said he was ‘suddenly taken from this Earth’ aged 57.

item.title: Tiny outback town Quilpie eyes ‘Kuwait of Queensland’ future as push grows to unlock oil reserves
item.description: A remote town with fewer than 50 people is now at the centre of a growing push to boost Australia’s fuel supply.

item.title: NBA superstar Victor Wembanyama suffers concussion in San Antonio’s shock playoffs loss to Portland
item.description: Victor Wembanyama laid on the floor for around 30 seconds before attempting to stagger to his feet.

item.title: Chinese EV battery powerhouse reveals 2000km-plus next-gen range-extender tech
item.description: CATL is pushing the EV battery envelope yet again, this time unveiling a range-extender battery with up to 600km of electric-only range.

item.title: 2027 Lexus NX: Facelifted Audi Q5 rival spied
item.description: A refreshed version of Lexus Australia’s best-selling model has been caught testing ahead of its expected unveiling this year.

item.title: Netball Australia CEO Stacey West steps down after major broadcast deal locked away
item.description: ‘I hand over the reins at the dawn of a new era with the sport poised for continued success.’

item.title: Little girl Esha remembered after being killed by ute while walking with family in Caboolture, Queensland
item.description: She had just been picked up from daycare and was walking home with her family when the tragic accident happened.
